Syriana (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,824,620Details
International Box Office $41,866,339
Worldwide Box Office $92,690,959
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,434,631
Total $15,434,631

Domestic Share:54.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2005 (Limited) by Warner Bros.
December 9th, 2005 (Expands Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: June 20th, 2006 by Warner Home Video

Running Time: 127 minutes
Plot point: Accidental Death, Arms Dealer, C.I.A., Corporate Malfeasance, Death of a Son or Daughter, Demoted, Government Corruption, Royalty, Suicide Bomber, Terrorism

Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
